rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'claude-haiku's' description, which includes the trailing period seen in the image. Both extractors correctly identified it as a header with no amounts.
Full consensus between both extractors for description, type, and empty amounts.
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description and all amount values (7£ 18s 2d). 'claude-haiku' misread the description as 'Dried Rents' and the pounds (29) and shillings (7).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds (377) and shillings (13) values. 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (72) and shillings (19).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds (54) and shillings (1) values. 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (15) and shillings (4).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (3). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (9). Both correctly interpreted the pence dot as 0.
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (321). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (100).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds (97) and shillings (6) values. 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (110) and shillings (9).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description (including '&c') and pounds value (55). 'claude-haiku' truncated the description ('&') and misread pounds (122).

Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description ('Other expenses') and all amount values (51£ 5s 10d). 'claude-haiku' misread description ('Misc. expenses'), pounds (133), and shillings (7). Its note about pence validity was confused.

This row, the subtotal for 'A. External', was correctly identified by 'gemini-flash' (R11). 'claude-haiku' missed this total. Visual verification confirms the amounts (968£ 8s 11d) and that there is no written description, so the description field is blank.
Visual verification confirms 'claude-haiku's' description, which includes the trailing period seen in the image. Both extractors correctly identified it as a header with no amounts.
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (530). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (14).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (652). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (55).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description (including '&c') and pounds value (199). 'claude-haiku' truncated the description ('&') and misread pounds (46).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (348). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (50). 'gemini-flash' also correctly noted the faint page reference '76'.
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (1256). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (50).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description ('Allowances') and pounds (1357) and pence (7) values. 'claude-haiku' omitted 's' from 'Allowances', misread pounds (95), and pence (9).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (58). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (105).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description ('Est:') and pounds value (909). 'claude-haiku' misread 'Est' as 'Lost' and pounds (118).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (1100). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (130). Both correctly interpreted the pence and shillings dots as 0.
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' pounds value (1170). 'claude-haiku' misread pounds (155). Both correctly interpreted the pence and shillings dots as 0.

Visual verification confirms this is a header. 'gemini-flash' correctly identified the 'row_type'. 'claude-haiku' identified it as an 'entry' but its notes describe it as a 'label row' with 'no amounts visible', which contradicts its 'entry' classification.

Visual verification confirms this is an entry with description 'Foundation' and amounts (1346£ 19s 11d). 'gemini-flash' is correct. 'claude-haiku' miscategorized it as a 'header', misread the description as 'Founders of Trust', and misread pounds (146).

Visual verification confirms this is an entry with description 'Trust' and amounts (826£ 1s 6d). 'gemini-flash' is correct. 'claude-haiku' put the amount in the description, misread shillings (16), and pence (0, due to misinterpreting a period).

Visual verification confirms this is an entry with amount (100£ 0s 0d). 'claude-haiku' correctly identified the 'row_type' as entry, but misread pounds (159). 'gemini-flash' incorrectly identified it as a header.
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description ('The sd Exp.'). 'claude-haiku' misread it as 'The Sundrie Fence'. Both correctly identified the amounts as 100£ 0s 0d.

Visual verification confirms this is an entry with description 'The Tuition Fund' and amounts (3394£ 7s 11d). 'gemini-flash' incorrectly classified it as a header and then listed the amount in a subsequent blank-description row. 'claude-haiku' completely misread the description as 'The Exhibition Fund.' and misread pounds (5).

Visual verification confirms this is an entry with description 'The Exhibition Fund.' and amounts (308£ 14s 2d). 'gemini-flash' incorrectly classified it as a header and then listed the amount in a subsequent blank-description row. 'claude-haiku' completely misread the description as 'Misc. expenses.' and misread pounds (155) and shillings (4).
Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description and amounts (1£ 2s 0d). 'claude-haiku' had lost row alignment by this point.

This row, the subtotal for 'B. Internal', was correctly identified by 'gemini-flash' (R33). 'claude-haiku' missed this total. Visual verification confirms the amounts (12339£ 9s 1d) and that there is no written description, so the description field is blank.
Full consensus between both extractors for description, type, and empty amounts.

Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description ('University') and all amount values (95£ 10s 6d). 'claude-haiku' misread 'University' as 'Utility' and misread all amount values (pounds as 205, shillings as 0, pence as 0).

Visual verification confirms this is a total row ('total payments') with amounts (13403£ 8s 6d). 'gemini-flash' is correct. 'claude-haiku' miscategorized as an 'entry' and misread all amount values (pounds as 9570, shillings as 6, pence as 0).

Visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's' description and all amount values (897£ 6s 8d). 'claude-haiku' misread the description as 'Balance to New Account' and misread all amount values (pounds as 13608, shillings as 8, pence as 6).

Visual verification confirms the amounts (14300£ 15s 2d). There is no written description, so the description field is blank. 'gemini-flash' correctly handled the blank description, while 'claude-haiku' incorrectly placed the amount values into the description field.
